_meta.role: 聾啞工人（Trinsic？居民），透過 Dupre 的解說讓玩家了解 Matt 無法言語，應去問他的妻子。

translations.en: a gaunt fellow, with eyes that take in everything and reveal nothing.
translations.zh: 一名瘦削的漢子，雙眼將一切盡收，卻不流露分毫。

translations.en: When you address him, the man replies with gestures that appear to be some kind of sign language.
translations.zh: 汝向他開口時，此人僅以手勢回應，似乎是某種手語。

translations.en: When he sees that you can't understand him, he shrugs his shoulders and returns to his duties.
translations.zh: 他見汝聽不懂他的意思，便聳了聳肩，回去繼續做他的事。

translations.en: Dupre puts his hand on your shoulder and whispers
translations.zh: 杜普雷將手搭上汝的肩膀，低聲說道

translations.en: "Matt here had a most unfortunate accident as a child, and it left him deaf and dumb.
translations.zh: 「這位馬特幼時遭逢不幸，自此便又聾又啞。

translations.en: I'd suggest you ask his wife instead, $P."

translator_notes: Matt 為聾啞 NPC，所有對白由 Dupre 旁白替代。譯文採文白並用，杜普雷沿用既定譯名。
